---
title: "Contributors"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-06-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

Mattia Dellamonica:
  
  Extracting data and query table
  
  
Manuel Grosso, Anna Dell'Aquila:

  Calling Api and waiting time


Aron Maggisano, Giorgio De Siena:

  Plotting map
  
Mahdi Hamrouni:

  Creating packaging, adjusting file DESCRIPTION, merging all the work, testing
  

Overall:

  Everybody helps the other members in case of aid.
